Stephens Shared Services LLC is the sponsor of the Stephens Inc 401(k) plan.  The plan covers Stephens Inc and other affiliated companies.

I will not receive any severance payments upon my departure.  Additionally, I continue to participate in the company's defined 401k contribution plan.  I received $7,094 of employer contributions for the 2024 plan year to my 401(k) on  2/24/2025.  The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (1981-10-01)

Pursuant to the Shareholder Approved Non-Employee Restricted Stock Plan, I have been entitled to receive restricted stock awards each year I was a non-employee director on the date awards were approved by the compensation committee of the Board of Directors. Stock awards vest six months from the date of issuance. As a result, all previously awarded restricted stock has vested.  Stock awards are approved in May to non- employee directors elected by shareholders for the upcoming year.  If I'm not a director in May 2025, I will not be voted to receive a restricted stock award. (2001-01-01)

I will enter into a separate contract with WAS Family Office LLC to provide the following services for a fixed annual fee based on the prevailing market rate: Estate/financial planning services; Tax planning services; Accounting and legal service; Use of aircraft; Use of secretarial/IT support; Use of office, and travel planning/assistance.
